title: GEIH Empalme Catalog
description: Annual GEIH Empalme microdata catalogs (2010-2020). Each entry is one ZIP per year containing 12 monthly sub-ZIPs with Cabecera/Resto structure (geih_2006_2020 epoch). Keys are 4-digit year strings.

data_version.description: Latest year covered by this catalog.

scraped_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this catalog was last verified.

data.description: Annual Empalme entries keyed by 4-digit year string (2010-2020).

catalog_id.description: Numeric catalog ID in the DANE Microdatos portal.

idno.description: NADA-style IDNO string used by the DANE API (e.g. DANE-DIMPE-GEIH-EMPALME-2015).

downloadable.description: True when the ZIP file has been published and is publicly accessible. False for years where DANE has created the catalog record but not yet uploaded the data (currently 2020).

download_url.description: Direct URL to the annual ZIP. Pattern: https://microdatos.dane.gov.co/index.php/catalog/{catalog_id}/download/{resource_id}. Null when downloadable=false.

landing_page.description: URL to the DANE catalog landing page for this year.

zip_filename.description: Filename served via Content-Disposition by the download URL. Null when downloadable=false. Note: 2013 has a DANE-side typo in the filename.

size_bytes.description: Content-Length in bytes confirmed via HTTP HEAD. Null when downloadable=false.

checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the downloaded ZIP. Null until computed.

notes.description: Free-form notes: filename typos, publication anomalies, IDNO irregularities, etc.
